description: This diagram illustrates the two main product components derived from the Very High Resolution (VHR) 2012-2018 Lot4: Riparian Zones project. The main product, "VHR 2012-2018 Lot4: Riparian Zones", is broken down into two categories: a Primary product and a Reference product. The Primary product consists of "Land Cover/Land Use (LULC) 2012-2018 with change mapping". The Reference product is the "Parent Scene Identification Layer (PSIL)".
